HGSS.120.0000:
You see the item over there?\f
It was me who dropped it, but I cannot
get over there to pick it up.\f
Why?\f
Walking on ice makes your feet freeze!\f
My shoes are so worn that the soles
are gone!
HGSS.120.0001:
You see the item over there?\f
It was me who dropped it, but I cannot
get over there to pick it up.\f
Why?\f
Walking on ice makes your feet freeze!\f
My shoes are so worn that the soles
are gone!\f
HGSS.120.0002:
The item you picked up over there...
it was an HM, wasn’t it?\f
I am the one who dropped it...but I
want you to keep it.\r
You took the time to get it, right?\f
It contains Waterfall.
Have fun climbing waterfalls!\f
Me?\f
I still need a new pair of shoes
before I can enjoy waterfalls.
HGSS.120.0003:
Me oh my...
Is that you, [0103,0000,0000]?\r
Fancy meeting you here!\f
To tell the truth...my sandals are
frozen on the ice, and I am stuck here.\f
In other words, my flip-flops are
quick-frozen to the ground.\f
Tee hee.\f
Well, it’s no laughing matter. Would you
come around and push my back?
HGSS.120.0004:
Me oh my...
Is that you, [0103,0000,0000]?\r
Fancy meeting you here!\f
To tell the truth...my sandals are
frozen on the ice, and I am stuck here.\f
In other words, my flip-flops are
quick-frozen with the ground.\f
Tee hee.\f
Well, it’s no laughing matter.
Would you push my back? [0200,0000]
HGSS.120.0006:
Don’t be so cruel.
You will push my back,\r
won’t you? [0200,0000]
HGSS.120.0007:
You really are kind.\f
Thank you so much!\f
